description: Create a ThemeService and integrate dark mode toggle into the app shell, then update all component styles to use CSS custom properties for theming.
steps: Create a ThemeService at apps/web/src/app/theme/theme.service.ts following the singleton pattern (@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })). The service should: (1) manage a 'theme' signal or BehaviorSubject with values 'light' | 'dark', (2) persist the user's choice to localStorage with key 'rm-theme', (3) on init read from localStorage (defaulting to 'light' if not set), (4) apply the theme by adding a 'dark' class to the document.documentElement (html element) when dark mode is active and removing it when light mode is active, (5) expose a toggle() method and a current theme getter/observable.

Update apps/web/src/styles.scss to define CSS custom properties (variables) on :root for the light theme and on :root.dark for the dark theme. Variables to define: --rm-bg (light: #f8f7f2, dark: #1a1a1a), --rm-surface (light: #fff, dark: #2a2a2a), --rm-text (light: #20201d, dark: #e8e8e3), --rm-text-secondary (light: #666, dark: #aaa), --rm-border (light: #eee, dark: #3a3a3a), --rm-primary (light: #1c5b55, dark: #3cb5a9), --rm-primary-surface (light: #e8f5f3, dark: #1a3a36), --rm-shadow (light: rgba(0,0,0,0.06), dark: rgba(0,0,0,0.3)), --rm-input-bg (light: #fff, dark: #333), --rm-input-border (light: #ddd, dark: #555), --rm-header-bg (light: #fff, dark: #222), --rm-header-border (light: #eee, dark: #333), --rm-danger (light: #c0392b, dark: #e74c3c), --rm-tag-bg (light: #ece7d9, dark: #3d3526), --rm-tag-text (light: #5b4536, dark: #d4c4a8). Then update the body rule to use var(--rm-bg) and var(--rm-text). Update the 'a' color to use var(--rm-primary).

Update apps/web/src/app/app.component.ts to inject ThemeService and expose a method and property for the template to toggle theme. Add a currentTheme property (or derive from the service). Add a toggleTheme() method.

Update apps/web/src/app/app.component.html to add a dark mode toggle button in the nav area (next to the language switcher). Use a sun/moon icon or text label. The button should call toggleTheme() on click.

Update apps/web/src/app/app.component.scss to: (1) replace hardcoded colors with CSS variables (e.g., .app-shell background: var(--rm-bg), color: var(--rm-text); .app-header background: var(--rm-header-bg), border-color: var(--rm-header-border); .nav-link color: var(--rm-text); .btn-logout border-color/color use variables; .btn-lang uses variables), (2) style the new theme toggle button consistently with the lang-switcher buttons.

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-list.component.ts inline styles to replace hardcoded colors with CSS variables: .recipe-card background var(--rm-surface), border var(--rm-border), shadow var(--rm-shadow); .card-link h3 color var(--rm-text); .description/.loading/.empty color var(--rm-text-secondary); .meta color var(--rm-text-secondary); .tag background var(--rm-primary-surface), color var(--rm-primary); .btn-new and .btn-import updated.

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-detail.component.ts inline styles to use CSS variables: .meta-bar background var(--rm-bg); .description color var(--rm-text-secondary); h3 color var(--rm-text); .meta-item strong color var(--rm-text-secondary); .category-tag uses var(--rm-primary-surface) and var(--rm-primary); .recipe-tag uses var(--rm-tag-bg) and var(--rm-tag-text); .btn-edit uses var(--rm-primary); .btn-delete uses var(--rm-danger); .loading color var(--rm-text-secondary); .error color var(--rm-danger).

Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-form.component.ts inline styles to use CSS variables: .form-section background var(--rm-surface), border var(--rm-border); input/textarea border var(--rm-input-border), background var(--rm-input-bg), color var(--rm-text); input:focus/textarea:focus border-color var(--rm-primary); .btn-add background var(--rm-primary-surface), color var(--rm-primary); .btn-remove background and color use danger variables; .btn-cancel background var(--rm-border); .btn-submit uses var(--rm-primary); .loading color var(--rm-text-secondary); .error color var(--rm-danger).
Update apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-import.component.ts inline styles similarly: .form-section, input, buttons all use CSS variables.

Update apps/web/src/app/auth/login.component.ts inline styles: .auth-container background var(--rm-surface), shadow; input uses var(--rm-input-bg), var(--rm-input-border), var(--rm-text); button uses var(--rm-primary); .error uses var(--rm-danger); .link a uses var(--rm-primary).

Update apps/web/src/app/auth/register.component.ts, apps/web/src/app/auth/confirm.component.ts, and apps/web/src/app/auth/change-password.component.ts inline styles the same way as login.component.ts (they share the same .auth-container pattern).

Add i18n keys to apps/web/src/assets/i18n/en.json under APP: add 'THEME_TOGGLE_LIGHT' with value 'Switch to light mode' and 'THEME_TOGGLE_DARK' with value 'Switch to dark mode' (or a simpler approach: 'DARK_MODE' / 'LIGHT_MODE'). Add corresponding German translations in apps/web/src/assets/i18n/de.json.

Add smooth transition for theme switching: in styles.scss add a rule that applies transition on background-color and color to body and common elements (e.g., body { transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; }).
acceptance_criteria: A ThemeService exists at apps/web/src/app/theme/theme.service.ts that is injectable, persists theme choice to localStorage, and applies a 'dark' class on document.documentElement
The app header contains a visible toggle button for switching between light and dark mode
All component styles use CSS custom properties instead of hardcoded colors for backgrounds, text, borders, inputs, and buttons
When dark mode is active, the page has a dark background with light text and all UI elements are visually consistent
Theme preference persists across page reloads via localStorage
Build passes: 'pnpm nx run-many -t build lint' completes without errors
Both English and German i18n files contain the new theme-related translation keys
verification: Run 'pnpm nx run-many -t build lint' and confirm it passes without errors
